one_time_description: Comox Valley Regional District revenue of $3,258,620 and Specific Claims revenue of $2,110,096 — both appear non-recurring; CVRD amount likely related to land/watershed improvements
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in A-Tlegay Fisheries LP (18%), Nanwakolas Offset LP (11.88%), Nanwakolas Timber LP (20.648%) which includes Knight Inlet Grizzly Lodge Ltd. GBEs reported combined net income of $4,447,783 in 2023. Solar panel installation contract committed for FY2024. CVPWS made significant improvements to jointly-owned land. Nation guarantees CMHC loans of $1,283,566 and BMO loans of $623,920 to band members.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 — this is a 2023 year-end statement, not 2024. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (4 partnerships). Comox Valley Regional District $3,258,620 and Specific Claims $2,110,096 appear to be large non-recurring items. Province of BC receivable of $6,893,214 and deferred revenue of $6,713,188 from Province are unusually large — likely related to treaty or land-related transfers. CVPWS land improvements of $741,586 capitalized as contributed revenue. Loans receivable of $18.7M largely represent advances to Nation's own trusts and LPs. No schedule of remuneration provided. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC $4,339,812 + Province of BC $2,615,679 + FNHA $585,774 + BC Treaty Commission $775,000 + Comox Valley Regional District $3,258,620 = $11,574,885 (rounded to $11,574,882 per segment); osr = total revenue minus government transfers.
